title: firecrawl/firecrawl
summary: Firecrawl 是一个用于大规模搜索、抓取和与网页交互的 API。它支持 AI 代理、AI 爬虫、数据提取、HTML 转 Markdown 等功能，特别适合为 LLM 提供结构化网页数据。该项目在 GitHub 上拥有超过 15 万星标，是 AI 数据采集领域的热门工具。
summary_en: Firecrawl is an API for searching, scraping, and interacting with the web at scale. It supports AI agents, AI crawling, data extraction, HTML-to-Markdown conversion, and is tailored for providing structured web data to LLMs. With over 150k stars on GitHub, it's a popular tool in AI data acquisition.
